title: SettingsSchema
description: Read-only registry entry for a single settings FIELD within a group (e.g. `notify_approaching_cap`, `default_locale_code`). Assembled at boot from #[AsSetting] class properties + `sections[].fields[]` blocks. Drives (a) the SDUI settings form renderer, (b) validation of incoming PATCH bodies on `PATCH /api/v1/settings/{group}`, (c) default-value seeding when a workspace first reads a value.

x-eloquent.note: VIRTUAL — not a DB row. Nested under SettingsGroup.sections[].fields[].

name.description: Field slug. Combined with group_key + scope-owner id to form the SettingValue primary lookup.

control_type.description: Widget the SDUI form renderer uses.

value_type.description: Native PHP type used for casts on SettingValue.value_json + validation.

default_value.description: Applied when no SettingValue row exists for this (owner, group, field). Type must match value_type. Null allowed for nullable fields.

read_only.description: True = field surfaces in the UI but PATCH refuses writes to it. Used for fields whose value is derived (e.g. workspace-computed) or system-owned.

hidden.description: True = field is registered but never rendered. Used for legacy fields kept for backward-compat.

options.description: For select / multiselect / radio: static option map { key: label } OR array of { key, label } tuples.

options_source.description: For dynamic options: a registry key like `geography.countries`, `workspace-locales.enabled`, or a URL. Resolved at render time.

item_fields.description: For control_type=repeater: nested field definitions per item.

translatable.description: When true, PATCH accepts per-locale values instead of a single scalar; SettingValue.value_json stores `{ locale: value }`. See localization module.

x-related.kind: persisted value keyed on (owner, group_key, name)
